addon.name: 3DGS Render by KIRI Engine
addon.install_note: release folder name contains dots (invalid Python module); installed as ~/.config/blender/5.1/scripts/addons/kiri_3dgs_render
addon.headless_note: fresh imports arrive with Update Mode=1 (manual, frozen view matrix) and render blank; set Update Mode=0 on KIRI_3DGS_Render_GN then run sna.dgs_render_update_enabled_3dgs_objects_6d7f4 with the scene camera set

splats.license_caveat: underlying capture originates from the Deep Blending research dataset (Hedman et al. 2018); reconstruction made with the official 3DGS method — chain of rights recorded, not re-audited
